name: UnBank Check Cashing- North Minneapolis at Merwins
description_short: Locally owned Twin Cities check-cashing service offering check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and gift card conversion since 1984.
description_long:
UnBank is a locally owned and operated check-cashing business that has served the Twin Cities and surrounding communities since 1984. The company positions itself as an alternative to traditional banking by offering financial services at extended hours (late nights and weekends) and without the typical barriers of traditional banks.

UnBank's core services include cashing personal, government, business, and payroll checks with no holding periods or credit checks. Beyond check cashing, they offer Western Union money transfers, same-day electronic bill payment services for over 13,000 providers, and cash conversion for unwanted gift cards. All services are available across multiple Twin Cities locations.

The company differentiates itself through transparency and accessibility. UnBank emphasizes "fair and plainly posted rates," "no fine print fees," and "no hidden fees or charges." They explicitly state that customers "know exactly what your service will cost" and highlight the convenience of late and weekend hours for customers who cannot access services during standard business hours.

While UnBank addresses a genuine need for accessible financial services, customers should understand that check-cashing services typically carry fees that are higher than traditional bank checking accounts. The company does not offer credit products, lending, or deposit accounts. This service is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate access to funds without meeting banking requirements.
pros: No holding periods on checks—immediate access to funds
No credit checks required to use services
Extended hours including late nights and weekends for convenience
Transparent, plainly posted rates with no hidden fees or fine print
Locally owned and operated since 1984 with established community presence
Same-day electronic bill payment to over 13,000 providers
Multiple services at single locations (checks, transfers, bill pay, gift cards)
cons: Check-cashing fees are typically higher than maintaining a traditional bank account
No deposit accounts or savings products offered
Limited to Twin Cities and surrounding communities—not a national service
Does not offer credit products or lending services
best_for: Unbanked individuals who need immediate check cashing without credit checks
Customers requiring urgent bill payment to prevent utility shutoffs or late fees
People needing financial services outside standard business hours
Those seeking transparent fee structures without hidden charges
diagnosis: UnBank is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers in the Twin Cities who need immediate access to funds from checks or urgent bill payment services without credit checks or holding periods. The main caveat is that check-cashing fees are structurally higher than traditional bank accounts, so this is a convenience premium for those without banking access rather than a cost-effective long-term solution.
services: Western Union money transfers (send and receive)
Extended hours including nights and weekends
